fab_section_md:
- As a plotter he argued from his Faith that the Lyseni had no place in the Seven Kingdoms and that Larra was to die with her brothers. The High Septon won him clemency; he was gelded and made to walk to Oldtown with his manhood about his neck (fab-the-lysene-spring-24-p02:147)
- He lived as a silent scribe (fab-the-lysene-spring-24-p02:147)
identity_line: Septon Bernard — As a plotter he argued from his Faith that the Lyseni had no place in the Seven Kingdoms and that Larra was to die with her brothers. The High Septon won him clemency; he was gelded and made to walk to Oldtown with his manhood about his neck.

fab_section_md: - Lady Sam, paramour of Lord Lyonel Hightower, took up the maimed Lotho Rogare to learn how to put Hightower gold to use, founding the Bank of Oldtown (fab-the-lysene-spring-24-p02:199)
identity_line: Samantha — Lady Sam, paramour of Lord Lyonel Hightower, took up the maimed Lotho Rogare to learn how to put Hightower gold to use, founding the Bank of Oldtown.
